Skip to contents
reactablePlus 0.1.0
  • Get started
  • Reference
    • Using Config Table with reactablePlus

Package index

Setup

Load widget dependencies and wire picker bindings inside reactable.

useReactablePlus() useSchoolHistory()
Include all reactablePlus widget dependencies
popoverDep()
Popover core dependency (shared JS + CSS)
bindPickersOnRender()
Bind picker inputs after a reactable renders
runExample()
Run a reactablePlus example app

Picker Widgets

Input constructors and update functions for inline cell editors. Each widget has a Shiny input binding, so its value is available via input$<id> on the server side.

searchPickerInput() schoolPickerInput()
Search picker input
updateSearchPickerInput() updateSchoolPickerInput()
Update a search picker from the server
useTypeaheadSearch() useSchoolSearch()
Wire up server-side typeahead search
attendancePickerInput()
Attendance picker input
updateAttendancePickerInput()
Update an attendance picker from the server
homeschoolPickerInput()
Homeschool picker input
updateHomeschoolPickerInput()
Update a homeschool picker from the server
notesInput()
Notes text input
updateNotesInput()
Update a notes input from the server
gearPopoverInput()
Gear popover settings input
updateGearPopoverInput()
Update a gear popover from the server

Config-Driven Table Module

A Shiny module that renders an editable table from a declarative table_config object. Handles widget dispatch, mutual exclusion, fill-down, gear toggles, and data marshaling.

config_table_ui()
Config-driven Editable Table UI
config_table_server()
Config-driven Editable Table Server
table_config()
Build a table configuration
widget_col()
Build a widget column specification
normalize_choices()
Normalize dropdown choices to list-of-lists format

Grade Utilities

Helper functions for working with grade-level keys (PK through 12). Convenience utilities for education-domain applications; not required by the core table infrastructure.

gradeChoices() gradeLabelMap()
Grade choices and labels
gradeIndex()
Grade ordering index
gradeInRange()
Check if a grade falls within a school's grade range

On this page
